description: Automate a headless Chromium browser to browse pages, take screenshots, click elements, and fill forms. Only public http/https URLs are allowed; private/internal IPs are blocked.

tools.name: browse_url
tools.description: Navigate to a public URL and return the visible text content.

parameters.name: wait_seconds
parameters.description: Seconds to wait after page load for dynamic content (max 10).

tools.returns: Visible text content of the page body.
tools.whenToUse: Use when a page requires JavaScript rendering or interaction to retrieve meaningful text.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for static pages where extract_text from web-search would suffice. Do not use for internal/private URLs.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of a public URL and save it as a PNG in the work directory.

parameters.name: full_page
parameters.description: Capture the full scrollable page instead of the viewport.

tools.returns: Path to the saved screenshot file.
tools.whenToUse: Use when the user explicitly asks for a visual capture of a public page.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for internal pages or when the user only needs text content.

tools.name: click_element
tools.description: Click an element on a public page by CSS selector and return the resulting page text.

parameters.name: selector
parameters.description: CSS selector of the element to click.

tools.returns: Visible text content after the click.
tools.whenToUse: Use to interact with navigation, buttons, or tabs that reveal content.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for destructive actions, form submission, or internal URLs.

tools.name: fill_form
tools.description: Fill a form field on a public page by CSS selector and return the resulting page text.

parameters.name: selector
parameters.description: CSS selector of the input field.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to enter into the field.

tools.returns: Visible text content after filling the field.
tools.whenToUse: Use to populate search boxes or filter inputs that update page content dynamically.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use to submit authentication forms, payment forms, or internal applications.
